entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Semi-tropical and temperate sorghum genotypes used in Africa and India

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by limited water availability

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of total upper leaf surface of a crop to the surface area of the land on which the crop grows

entities.name: GROWTH DURATION
entities.description: The length of time from planting to maturity

entities.name: MIDDAY LEAF WATER POTENTIAL
entities.description: A measure of the water tension in the leaf at midday

entities.name: RELATIVE WATER CONTENT
entities.description: The ratio of the amount of water in a leaf to the amount of water it would contain when fully turgid

entities.name: LEAF ROLLING
entities.description: A physiological response to water stress where leaves curl

entities.name: BIOMASS PER DAY
entities.description: The daily rate of plant material production

entities.name: PLANT WATER STATUS
entities.description: The overall hydration level of the plant

entities.name: DROUGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a genotype to maintain productivity or survival under drought stress

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Region where semi-tropical sorghums are utilized and developed

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Region where semi-tropical sorghums are utilized and developed

entities.name: BET DAGAN
entities.description: Specific site in Israel where field tests were performed

entities.name: ISRAEL
entities.description: Country where the research field tests were conducted

entities.name: FIELD-TESTING
entities.description: The process of evaluating crop performance under real-world field conditions
